use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF ATTENTION DEFICIT HYPERACTIVITY DISORDER

indications.text:
MYDAYIS is indicated for the treatment of Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD) in patients
13 years and older [see Clinical Studies (14)].
Limitations of Use:
Pediatric patients 12 years and younger experienced higher plasma exposure than patients 13 years
